title: List of heterosexual female archetypes
intro: A field guide to the heterosexual female archetypes currently in circulation on the English-language web — the companion volume to the cishet male guide. Sections, and entries within each section, run roughly from most to least common. Glosses describe how each term is **used**, not an endorsement of the stereotype; many women belong to several categories at once. Slurs and extremist-scene terms are flagged rather than omitted.

items.gloss: entitled middle-aged woman who demands the manager; the internet's default villainess
self-explanatory
mainstream tastes (pumpkin spice, Uggs, live-laugh-love) treated as an entire personality
chaotic life, charming delivery
hard-charging career woman and empowerment-as-individual-success politics; born sincere in 2014, now mostly said with an eye-roll (even its coiner asked people to stop)
the woman of the moment: effortless magnetism, everyone copying her before the season ends
performs total unbotheredness; on apps, insists she requires nothing and objects to nothing until the accumulated unspoken requirements arrive as a final indictment
loyal to and protective of other women; the declared opposite of a pick-me
messy hedonistic confidence; Charli XCX 2024 edition, worn as a personality
"delusional," worn proudly; unbothered overconfidence about a crush, a goal, a timeline, or a relationship that the man involved has not agreed to ("delulu is the solulu")
narrates her life as a film in which everyone else is supporting cast
entrepreneurial empowerment narrowed to direct-sales pitches, copied DMs and a promise that the downline is almost profitable
performs beer-drinking, drama-free, "one of the guys" ease to please men; named and demolished by the *Gone Girl* monologue
romanticizes office work through commute routines, laptop cafés, polished outfits and carefully framed desk content
confident, impeccably styled and camera-ready; beauty, sex appeal and social-media fluency treated as a single skill set
up at 5 a.m., journaling, matcha, workout finished before you wake; discipline as aesthetic
slicked bun, dewy "no-makeup" makeup, gold hoops; effortlessness that costs a fortune
party-forward, independent, unbothered
melancholy-as-aesthetic, Lana Del Rey soundtrack included
artsy, baby-banged and conspicuously effortless; the niche-taste downtown girlfriend supposedly caught looking interesting without trying

items.terms: Cat lady / Dog mom / Plant mom
items.gloss: identity built around dependents who never talk back
suburban family logistics as a full-time command center: practices, carpools, fundraisers and strongly worded school emails
sexually attractive mother
pushes relentlessly for achievement; hovers over every decision and obstacle long after independent flight was scheduled
older woman who dates notably younger men
decorative younger wife as status purchase
indulgent, childfree, arrives with gifts and leaves before bedtime
motherhood survived one sauvignon blanc at a time; the female counterpart to minion-meme dads
identity organized around raising sons or daughters ("boy mom" carries extra baggage online)

items.terms: Dance mom / Pageant mom / Sports mom
items.gloss: the kid's activity becomes her career, social world and proxy competition
organic, natural-birth, essential oils; a spectrum running from granola to anti-vax
full-time homemaking as a public brand and, at the edges, an ideology: vintage dresses, sourdough, camera-ready lighting; runs from lifestyle content to far-right adjacent traditionalism
the tradwife arc minus the ring; domestic content without the marriage
answers hunger with "have some almonds"; diet culture passed down like an heirloom
turns motherhood, children and the family home into an aspirational content business
parents at other parents, loudly and in public
removes primary colors from childhood in favor of wood toys, oatmeal linen and a nursery the color of wet cardboard
military-wife stereotype accused of treating her spouse's rank, paycheck and benefits as her own *(pejorative military slang)*

sections.title: Dating-App Personas & Behaviors
sections.note: Labels for both presentation and recurring low-commitment patterns. The centerpiece section, as with the men.

items.gloss: the concealed secondary partner; the longer-running accusation that she knowingly destabilizes someone else's relationship
vanishes without explanation; the cloaker also blocks you everywhere so the whole thing appears never to have happened
floods a new partner with affection, certainty and imagined shared futures, then abruptly withdraws or turns controlling
explicitly trades youth, beauty and companionship for financial support; the Splenda version keeps meeting men without the necessary liquidity
relationship access without a relationship label; the deliberately concealed casual partner
seeks male approval by contrasting herself with supposedly difficult, superficial or overly feminine women

items.terms: Male-best-friend girl / "All my friends are guys" girl
items.gloss: advertises effortless ease with men while presenting female friendship as impossible drama; the classic pick-me-adjacent conversational set
planning, paying, driving and problem-solving remain the man's department; femininity framed as exemption from logistics

items.terms: Astrology screener / Attachment-style diagnostician / Love-language girl
items.gloss: asks for a birth time before a surname; explains his slow replies as "avoidant attachment"; runs compatibility frameworks as an automated rejection system
boundaries, triggers, "holding space" and "protecting my peace" as an all-purpose vocabulary for preferences, conflict and strategic withdrawal
clingy, jealous and surveillance-minded partner; the 2012 advice-animal meme became shorthand for the type
the profile-cliché lineup: Machu Picchu, Aperol spritz, a small dog called her son, and identical answers about Sunday mornings
advertises marriage, children and complementary roles early; dates are auditions for a predetermined domestic schedule
jokes about emotional unavailability as a hereditary title; over-texts and reads ordinary delays as impending abandonment
reroutes matches toward a public account where romantic interest, audience growth and lifestyle marketing blur together

items.terms: "Make me laugh" girl / "Fluent in sarcasm" girl / "Never on here" girl
items.gloss: delegates entertainment to the applicant; warns that teasing is a personality; maintains an active profile while claiming not to use it

items.terms: Checklist dater / Six-foot-minimum girl / "No broke boys" girl
items.gloss: the profile as procurement spec: height, income, education and neighborhood listed more clearly than anything she herself enjoys
reveals a hand or a second wineglass before the man's face; posts him unmistakably; converts the relationship into a recurring content franchise
just enough intermittent attention to stop a prospect from moving on
flattering but materially misleading photos, aggressive editing, or technically historical representations of her current appearance

items.terms: "If he wanted to, he would" girl
items.gloss: reduces ambiguous male behavior to universal verdicts; maintains searchable internal case law of texting rules and warning signs, with a "beige flag" tier for habits too boring to be red but too weird to ignore
explains every incompatibility through her success and standards; sometimes accurately, sometimes before anyone identified those as the problem
dates for experience, anecdotes and seasonal momentum; bad choices become story material
commits fast because she needs housing, money, transport or an exit from her current living arrangement
accumulates matches for reassurance, entertainment or market research, with little intention of replying, let alone meeting
builds intimacy through vacations, weddings, children and apartments she has no settled intention of pursuing
accepts dates with little romantic interest because the restaurant is nice and the meal is free
every profile, opener and ambiguous text goes to an advisory board with veto power that never meets the defendant
stopped dating him but likes every post and watches every story

items.terms: Good-morning texter / Pen-pal dater / Voice-note girl
items.gloss: ritual daily messaging; weeks of intimacy without meeting; asynchronous podcasts addressed to one man; asks about the five-year plan before the appetizers arrive
resurfaces after weeks or months as though no explanation is owed
secretly dates several people while implying exclusivity; secures the next branch before releasing the current one
keeps a man warm as a substitute; maintains backup options in case the main relationship fails
periodically pings an ex or abandoned match to confirm the option is still retrievable
keeps a partner away from friends, family and the feed so the relationship never becomes fully real or hard to replace
several semi-active prospects at different stages of vetting, tracked more carefully than her friendships

sections.title: Internet Girlfriend Zoology
sections.note: Women classified as animals, tropes, or "material."

items.gloss: beautiful, mysterious seductress whose attraction arrives bundled with danger and probable ruin
affectionate long-term-partner label
sorted into marriage-worthy versus fun-for-now; a taxonomy women largely did not request
quirky free spirit who exists to teach a brooding man to embrace life; coined by a film critic in 2007, apologized for by the same critic since
sunny, affectionate, no games
aloof, independent, selectively affectionate; markets mystery as quiet confidence and pairs, at least online, with a golden retriever boyfriend
traits that read as male-fantasy projection: effortlessly hot, zero needs, loves everything he loves
older or mother-coded dominant woman whose authority is threatening, nurturing and sexual at once
chaotic, goofy, lovable; one shared brain cell, rarely in her possession
campus-social archetype of coordinated outfits, rush week, status rituals and highly networked female friendship
genteel Southern femininity: sweet tea, manners, steel underneath
"like, totally"; the accent outlived the mall
big hair, bigger loyalty, zero pretension
flashy, loud or supposedly classless woman in hip-hop-era slang *(racialized and class-pejorative in much of its use)*
the chaotic local-news counterpart to Florida Man
loud, hyperfeminine schoolgirl stereotype associated with thick brows and spicy snacks *(racialized and class-coded, often targeting Black and Latina girls)*
Asian American nightlife archetype associated with lashes, tattoos, boba and raves; rooted in working-class Southeast Asian subcultures, then broadened online
posh West-London woman of the pearls-and-Barbour tradition (dated but preserved)
British tabloid stereotype of the brash working-class woman *(pejorative)*
female half of the UK chav stereotype *(class pejorative)*
the girls of UK roadman culture
Australian streetwear-and-attitude youth stereotype
self-identified super-feeler; announces that she absorbs everyone's emotions, usually unprompted
announces her new boundaries the way others announce engagements
journaling, therapy-speak, "protecting my energy"; recovery as lifestyle brand
gentle, sensitive, conflict-averse presentation (temperament, not the pastel aesthetic)
Taylor Swift fandom as identity, economy and voting bloc
enthusiastic devotion; the obsessive upgrade (named after the Eminem song)
female gamer; the label drags a decade of gatekeeping and "fake gamer girl" baggage behind it
the childhood horse obsession that never fully wears off
monetizes an online sexual persona through subscriptions, thirst traps and parasocial attention *(often used pejoratively)*
adult fandom organized around parks, merch, character lore and vacations planned with military precision
organized, multilingual, capable of moving charts and drowning hashtags
romance and "romantasy" reading as public identity, annotation tabs included
reads and writes the fandom's unofficial canon
anime-organized fan identity, female edition
supplements, saunas, sleep scores; optimization as identity
the drink as membership card
the walk, upgraded to a wellness protocol
reformer classes, matcha, matching neutral activewear sets
ice baths, recently annexed from the bros
schedules workouts, work and social life around menstrual phases (science pending)
attributes face puffiness, belly and mood to one hormone TikTok told her about
reads everyone through birth charts; "he's such a Gemini" as diagnosis
crystals, tarot, moon water; aesthetic-first spirituality
alternative healing as vocation
scripting, vision boards, the 369 method; wanting as a form of work
assumes everything works out for her, as a deliberate practice
cruelty as social currency; the *Mean Girls* blueprint
the dominant girl at the top of the social pyramid
self-appointed dominant woman; imported from the same discredited wolf study as the men's version
the "basic," average-tier woman in the same taxonomy; separately, slang for a generic white woman *(pejorative in both uses)*
worth measured in standards, self-care and what she can command from men; dating framed as mate-market strategy with expected provision and courtship
incel taxonomy's hot, unattainable woman; the female Chad *(derogatory manosphere slang)*
the special interest rotates monthly; the intensity never does
autistic-plus-ADHD self-identity, usually discovered via TikTok before any clinician
the underdiagnosed-women discourse: decades of camouflage, late diagnosis, retroactive reinterpretation of everything
feminist who excludes trans women from womanhood; the label itself is contested (slur to its targets, descriptor to its users)
"Make America Healthy Again": raw milk, no seed oils, vaccine skepticism as maternal duty
anti-Trump institutionalism with a Notorious RBG candle
the wellness-to-conspiracy pipeline: yoga and crystals sliding into anti-vax and worse
irreverent leftist podcast-scene woman
anti-woke femininity and the braided floral-dress traditional-femininity meme ideal, often performed for an approving male audience
online traditionalist who mixes Catholic aesthetics, reactionary politics and the visual grammar of an e-girl
weight-loss-drug era body: the girlie identity around semaglutide culture, or the gaunt "Ozempic face" look attributed to rapid loss
the surgically enhanced curve silhouette and everything the internet projects onto it
hyperfeminine, proudly ditzy persona rebranded as ironic self-aware fun
appearance-optimization culture and jawline pseudoscience imported from male forums

sections.title: Aesthetic Tribes I — Soft, Romantic & Polished
sections.note: Clean girl and That girl live in **Normie / Default Girls** above.

items.gloss: outdoorsy, eco-conscious fleece-and-hiking-boots woman; trail snacks and environmental virtue as lifestyle
precious childlike whimsy, from the Zooey Deschanel era and its periodic revivals
romanticized rural life: baking, gardening, prairie dresses, no landlords
head-to-toe hot pink maximal femininity (post-*Barbie*, 2023)
breezy linen affluence out of a Nancy Meyers film, adopted mostly by 28-year-olds
scarves, boots, pumpkin patches and aggressively wholesome fall content; the seasonal cousin of the basic girl
pastels, blush, hearts; cutesy hyper-feminine styling (look, not temperament — see Soft girl (temperament) under Emotional / Soft Girls)
bows, lace, ballet flats, Lana Del Rey; hyper-femininity as art direction
cream knits, gold jewelry, expensive-looking minimalism
the sunny, cream-trousers version of scholarly aesthetics
ethereal woodland whimsy; its moody celestial-witch cousin
wrap tops, leg warmers and buns, dance class optional
Mediterranean summer: linen, market produce, coastal light

sections.title: Aesthetic Tribes II — Edgy, Luxe & Retro

items.gloss: the broader alternative-styling family; the internet's fetishized gothic ideal
restrained, expensive, unbranded; wants insiders, not the public, to clock the price
low-rise jeans, butterfly clips and rhinestones, revived by people who were toddlers the first time
scrunchies, Hydro Flask, "save the turtles"; the 2019 period piece
dyed streaks, heavy blush, eyeliner hearts; TikTok-native alt styling
fur coat, leopard print, gold, red lips; maximalism with a hint of menace (2024's loud answer to the clean girl)
the accusation rather than the aesthetic: trying-too-hard millennial taste that aged out
90s-corporate power dressing with thin glasses and pencil skirts; deliberately HR-noncompliant
cute Sanrio maximalism paired, in the meme version, with emotional volatility and a warning not to date her
tweed, libraries and beautiful melancholy
city-cool thrifted nonchalance
deliberately offbeat maximal mixing; more is more
flash photography, smudged eyeliner, late-2000s nightlife revival
the original backstage devotee; now mostly historical or pejorative
wife or girlfriend of a professional athlete, treated by sports media as a luxury-lifestyle category of her own
the calendar bends around lineups
friendship bracelets, presale trauma, live music as identity
smudged eyeliner, leather, backstage-adjacent aesthetic
woman accused of following hockey players or rodeo cowboys for romantic access rather than the sport *(pejorative)*
nightlife tastemaker whose sets are secondary to her presence
messy, witty, self-sabotaging; breaks the fourth wall of her own life
paint-stained overalls, gallery dates, sketchbook in tote (coined within Black online creative communities, later broadened)
tragedy-coded reading list: Plath, Didion, an annotated *Bell Jar*
stages fashionable books more reliably than she finishes them
film taste as identity, star ratings as diary
literary melancholy with sunglasses and a famous packing list

items.terms: "My Year of Rest and Relaxation" girl
items.gloss: Moshfegh-brand dissociation as aspiration
Tumblr-revival posting: Lana lyrics, cigarettes, Nabokov moodboards

sections.title: "Literally Me" Fictional Women
sections.note: Fictional women adopted as mirrors, moodboards or warnings.

items.gloss: doomed vintage romance as a personality
*Gone Girl*'s vengeful perfectionist; the "cool girl" monologue treated as scripture
*Euphoria*'s beautiful, unstable, approval-starved cautionary tale, adopted anyway
earnest suburban self-mythologizer
vengeful hot-girl horror as empowerment aesthetic
aesthetically sensitive woman with a suspiciously curated playlist and calculated instability; the "male manipulator" mirror
*Skins*' silent chaos muse; patron saint of Tumblr's sad-girl era

sections.title: Femosphere & Dating-Coach Women
sections.note: The female parallel to the manosphere: strategy, standards and leveling up.

items.gloss: softness, receptivity and "letting him lead" as both spiritual practice and dating strategy
self-identified involuntarily celibate woman; ranges from ironic online identity to bitter forum culture
self-improvement explicitly aimed at attracting a richer tier of man
Leticia Padua's school of dating rich men, "sprinkle sprinkle" as sign-off; dubbed "the female Andrew Tate" by the press
sells standards, femininity and provider-man acquisition as a curriculum
Female Dating Strategy, the Reddit-born doctrine of vetting "high-value men" and discarding "low-effort" ones

sections.title: Wojaks & Terminally Online Women
sections.note: The internet's stick-figure everyman comics and forum vocabulary, female editions.

items.gloss: current generations of derogatory slang for a woman framed as promiscuous or excessively sexual *(misogynist slang; usage only)*
accused of repeating programmed opinions; separately, the 2023 livestreamers repeating catchphrases ("ice cream so good") for tips
knows every discourse cycle, cannot explain a single one to an outsider
black-haired nihilist comic character; the internet's sad-girl mascot
*(dehumanizing incel slur, short for "female humanoid"; usage only)*
*(dehumanizing incel slur for sexually active women; usage only)*
terminally online caricature of the aging twee millennial: doggo vocabulary, fandom merch and quirks hardened into identity *(derogatory)*
